hero.text: This is your moment; seize it!
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today you may feel a surge of energy, pushing you towards new adventures.
aries.love: Romance may be highlighted today, making you feel alive and inspired.
aries.career: A great opportunity at work may present itself; be ready to act.

taurus.general: A stable day filled with comfort and security awaits you.
taurus.love: Your relationship could deepen today; open your heart.
taurus.career: Focus on building strong foundations in your career this week.

gemini.general: Communication is key today; reach out to someone you've been thinking of.
gemini.love: A heartfelt conversation could strengthen your relationship.
gemini.career: Your networking skills could lead to exciting prospects.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity is coming your way; embrace your feelings.
cancer.love: Trust and honesty will take center stage in your relationships.
cancer.career: Work cooperatively with others and watch the synergy unfold.

leo.general: You are shining bright today; let your creativity out!
leo.love: Passion runs high; surprise your partner with something special.
leo.career: Showcases of your talent could lead to recognition at work.

virgo.general: Today prompts a focus on personal growth and health.
virgo.love: Make time for meaningful connections; they will nourish you.
virgo.career: Attention to detail can lead to significant achievements today.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
professional.author: Bo Bennett

motivation.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
motivation.author: Christian D. Larson

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

captions.text: Life is short. Make every hair flip fabulous!
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Be a voice, not an echo.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big, sparkle more, shine bright!
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: The future of technology is in your hands.
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Think like a proton; always positive!
tech.author: Unknown

tech.text: Embrace technology, or be left behind.
tech.author: Unknown

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Sandwiches are like people; they can be great or not great, depending on how many toppings you add.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Be like a cupcake in a world full of muffins.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is short, so smile while you still have teeth!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: May your day be as awesome as your hair on a good hair day!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: To believe in love is to believe in hope.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: With faith, all things are possible.
faith.author: Matthew 17:20

faith.text: Keep the faith, even when you're in the dark.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is a bird that feels dawn breaking and sings while it is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The wise does at once what the fool does finally.
wisdom.author: Baltasar Gracián
